mechanism_narrative: Sustained monthly payroll growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market expansion and rising consumer purchasing power, which drives equity valuations higher through increased corporate earnings expectations over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 137615.0 thousand as of Feb 2014
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during periods of PAYEMS growth > 150k are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate falls below 2.5% and remains in an accommodative stance for 3+ months, equity risk premiums compress and forward S&P 500 returns turn positive as investors rotate into equities seeking yield over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 40% of instances when FEDFUNDS < 2.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in housing starts (HOUST) and retail sales (RSAFS) signals accelerating consumer demand and construction activity, which raises corporate profit expectations and drives positive equity returns over the next 5 trading days through momentum in forward guidance.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1066.0 thousand, RSAFS at 384631.0 million as of Jan 2014
failure_condition: Rank IC of the interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or joint increases in HOUST and RSAFS do not produce positive 5-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) declines by more than 0.5% month-over-month, signaling supply-side weakness and potential margin compression that causes equity investors to reduce risk exposure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 50% of instances when INDPRO declines > 0.5%, or Rank IC > -0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises above 6.0% while payroll growth (PAYEMS) simultaneously decelerates below 100,000 persons monthly, signaling labor market deterioration that triggers risk-off positioning and negative equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 5.7%, PAYEMS at 137615.0 as of Jan 2014
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or recession onset
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of the interaction term > -0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation (CPIAUCSL) accelerates above 2.5% year-over-year while the federal funds rate remains below 2.5%, creating negative real rates that erode bond returns and force equity valuations lower as investors demand higher equity risk premiums over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 219.181, FEDFUNDS at 2.01% as of Jan 2014
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of the interaction term > -0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) accelerates to above 2.5% annualized in the prior quarter, signaling robust economic expansion that supports equity earnings growth and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate profit visibility.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 at 11700.6 billion chained 2017 dollars as of Nov 2013
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns are negative in > 45% of instances when GDPC1 growth > 2.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) and payroll employment (PAYEMS) both decline simultaneously by more than 0.3% month-over-month, signaling synchronized supply and labor weakness that indicates recession risk and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days through immediate risk-off repricing.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 111.8419, PAYEMS at 137615.0 as of Jan 2014
regime_hint: recession onset or severe supply shock
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 50% of triggered instances, or Rank IC of the interaction term > -0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.
